recommended.song_name: We Are Never Ever Getting Back Together
What Do Ya Think About That

content:
Maybe not entirely accurate, transcribed it by ear. Hope you like it!!
P.S., first tab.


[ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]   
I should have known by the way you passed me by[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]    
There was something in your eyes and it wasn't right[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]  
I should have walked but I never had the chance[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch] 
Everything got out of hand and I let it slide[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]      
Now I only have myself to blame for falling for your stupid games[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch] (abrupt stop)   
I wish my life could be the way it was before I saw your face[/tab]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]             
You stole my happy, you made me cry[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]

[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
And I wanna uh-uh-uh-uh-uh-undo it[/tab]
